impact: This advances the PP&D plan by connecting public source evidence to extracted obligations, required documents, missing user facts, stop gates, and reversible draft-only planning nodes without live crawling, private DevHub state, or irreversible automation.
summary: Add a redacted fixture-only requirement-to-process dependency graph for one public PP&D permit process, plus a narrow validator test.
target_task: Task checkbox-111: Task checkbox-106: Add a fixture-only requirement-to-process dependency graph for one public PP&D permit process that links source evidence, extracted obligations, required documents, user facts, stop gates, and reversible draft-only planning nodes. Keep all values redacted and citation-backed.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
